template:
module Main where
import Control.Exception (try, SomeException, evaluate)
import System.IO (hSetBuffering, stdout, BufferMode(NoBuffering))

interleaveWith :: (a -> b -> c) -> [a] -> [b] -> [c]
[[SLOT empty_left]]
interleaveWith f _ [] = []
interleaveWith f [x] ys = [[SLOT single_left]]
interleaveWith f xs [y] = [[SLOT single_right]]
interleaveWith f (x:xs) (y:ys) = [[SLOT recurse_step]]

main :: IO ()
main = kataMain

slots.name: recurse_step
slots.answer: f x y : interleaveWith f xs ys
decoys: f x y : f x y : interleaveWith f xs ys
[f x y] ++ interleaveWith f xs ys

prompt: Wire up the empty-list base case, the singleton special cases, and the cons recurse.
